title: helichrysum abietifolium
intro: Helichrysum abietifolium, also known as mountain everlast or mountain paper flower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Helichrysum abietifolium include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting liver and digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
